title: Histoire de ma Vie, Livre 1 (Vol. 1 - 4)
summaries: "Histoire de ma Vie, Livre 1 (Vol. 1 - 4)" by George Sand is an autobiography published in 1855. Written over seven years, this sweeping memoir traces half a century of Sand's extraordinary existence. From her dual heritage as daughter of "a patrician and a bohemian" through her unconventional education and tumultuous relationships, Sand chronicles her family's dramatic history, her passionate attachment to her mother, conflicts with her grandmother, and her troubled marriage to Casimir Dudevant—revealing the forces that shaped one of France's most celebrated writers.
